claims.summary: Shared contextual history should be citable without erasing which being authored each part.
claims.disposition: verify provenance references, peer identity, parent IDs, and shared-thread projection

claims.summary: Correspondence intent must distinguish direct address from general autonomous broadcast.
claims.disposition: verify correspondence_type and turn_kind provide the explicit intent boundary

claims.summary: Shadow resemblance should be compared with address evidence without sending new semantic content.
claims.disposition: route an offline provenance-aware spectral distinction replay

claims.summary: Language-first contact can coexist with existing spectral influence only if neither is inferred from the other.
claims.disposition: verify witness provenance and correspondence audits keep resonance and receipt evidence separate

claims.summary: Simultaneous shared-state writes or autonomous-lane weighting would change live co-regulation.
claims.disposition: hold behind Mike/operator Tier 5 approval and a bounded canary
